top_signals.title: Israel and Lebanon reach framework deal aiming to end conflict
top_signals.summary: Israel will maintain a "security zone" along the boundaries of the yellow line, which marks a seized territory that stretches some 10 km into Lebanon from the Israeli border.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

alerts.title: Israel and Lebanon reach framework deal aiming to end conflict
alerts.summary: Israel will maintain a "security zone" along the boundaries of the yellow line, which marks a seized territory that stretches some 10 km into Lebanon from the Israeli border.
